'''''Royal Sovereign''''' was a [[Broadside-class cruiser kdb-1|''Broadside''-class cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Behind the scenes==
The name ''Royal Sovereign'' fits easily with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] naming schemes (though it may seem more appropriate for a somewhat grander class of vessel than the Broadside), but it is notable in the real world as several British ships have been named [[Wikipedia:HMS Royal Sovereign|HMS ''Royal Sovereign'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
